CREATE TABLE Windows (
				rowid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
				type INTEGER NOT NULL,
				noteId NCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
				deviceName NCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
				x INTEGER NOT NULL,
				y INTEGER NOT NULL,
				w INTEGER NOT NULL,
				h INTEGER NOT NULL,
				topmost INTEGER NOT NULL
			)

CREATE TABLE TopmostPerType (
				rowid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
				type INTEGER NOT NULL,
				noteId NCHAR(64) NOT NULL
			)

CREATE TABLE Metadata (
				rowid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
				SchemaVersion INTEGER NOT NULL)
